name: gemini-autocomplete
description: Inline code completion powered by Gemini (or any OpenAI-compatible API)

geminiAutocomplete.apiKey.description: API key. Groq (free): https://console.groq.com/keys — or any OpenAI-compatible provider.

geminiAutocomplete.model.description: Model name. Gemini: gemini-3.1-flash-lite Groq: llama-3.3-70b-versatile, llama-3.1-8b-instant, etc.

geminiAutocomplete.endpoint.description: OpenAI-compatible chat completions URL. Gemini default: https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/openai/chat/completions Groq default. OpenRouter: https://openrouter.ai/api/v1/chat/completions

geminiAutocomplete.maxContextChars.description: Chars of code before/after cursor sent as context.
